Tests for battery, flash API, flash erase, FPC pinstrap, I2C timing, QEMU serial, RTC calibration, and a build script.


## Files
- **[test_battery.c](test_battery.c.md)**: Tests for battery voltage reading conversion and validation against legacy methods for stm32f2 and stm32f4.
- **[test_flash_api.c](test_flash_api.c.md)**: Tests for the flash API in the Pebble firmware, including initialization, erasure, and error handling.
- **[test_flash_erase.c](test_flash_erase.c.md)**: Tests for flash erase functionality, including sector and subsector operations, with error handling.
- **[test_fpc_pinstrap.c](test_fpc_pinstrap.c.md)**: Tests for the FPC pinstrap driver, verifying pinstrap result values and pull-up configurations.
- **[test_i2c_timingr.c](test_i2c_timingr.c.md)**: Tests for I2C timing register calculations on STM32F7, including valid and invalid scenarios.
- **[test_qemu_serial.c](test_qemu_serial.c.md)**: Tests for the QEMU serial driver, including message assembly and protocol handling.
- **[test_rtc_calibration.c](test_rtc_calibration.c.md)**: Tests for RTC calibration functionality, verifying calibration requirements under various conditions.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for testing firmware drivers with specified source and test files using the clar function.
